adaptive.title: 5-level adaptive IQ engine
adaptive.description: A placement test measures your starting level across memory, logic, numbers, attention and pattern recognition, then adapts as you improve.

ai.title: AI-explained answers
ai.description: Every wrong answer gets a clear, friendly explanation so mistakes turn into understanding.

games.title: 3 brain-training games
games.description: Memory Match, Sequence Puzzle and Mental Math Rush keep practice fun between full sessions.

progress.title: Progress you can see
progress.description: Track your level history, category strengths and streaks on a single dashboard.
